nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-crested tanager
nodes.summary: The yellow-crested tanager (Loriotus rufiventer) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the western Amazon Basin (Peru, Acre and northwestern Bolivia). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References

nodes.summary: Loriotus（Loriotus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Flame-crested tanager、Yellow-crested tanager、White-shouldered tanager。

nodes.name: Yellow-crested tanager

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
